Table A: Resident Feedback on Closed Cases

Based on resident review/rating left after MA closed the case. Each row adds up to 100%.

Resident Satisfied / Dissatisfied — read from the resident's own review text and star rating. MA reply is not used here. Closed, No Review means MA closed the case but the resident left no feedback. Click any cell to read the review.

3. Team Wins (Positive Feedback)

Residents Who Wrote In to Praise

These residents took the initiative to submit feedback specifically to praise the team.

Hi MA. Thank you for making an effort to enhance the security and safety of the residents by introducing the Visitor Message feature on HiLife. I appreciate the initiative to improve the situation. This might cause the turnaround time to be slightly... Hi MA. Thank you for making an effort to enhance the security and safety of the residents by introducing the Visitor Message feature on HiLife. I appreciate the initiative to improve the situation. This might cause the turnaround time to be slightly longer and some tenants might complain but it is the right thing to do. kudos to the team!
-- Resident, Blk 47, Apr 2026 | Admin & General
I would like to commend the security team for their prompt and professional action. There were three teenagers playing violently in the pool and ignoring other swimmers’ safety. I’m glad that two security guards stepped in quickly and asked them to... I would like to commend the security team for their prompt and professional action. There were three teenagers playing violently in the pool and ignoring other swimmers’ safety. I’m glad that two security guards stepped in quickly and asked them to leave the pool. Their timely intervention helped maintain a safe environment for everyone. Thank you for keeping the pool safe for residents.
-- Resident, Blk 57, Feb 2026 | Security & Access

Top 10 Problem Areas

Scoring formula (max 13 pts) — four signals, sub-clusters with 15+ cases only:
■ Volume — case count in last 6m   (≥30: 4pts   ≥20: 3pts   ≥15: 2pts)   ■ Recurrence — months with cases   (≥6: 3pts   4–5: 2pts   3: 1pt)   ■ Open burden — % cases still open   (>30%: 3pts   15–30%: 2pts   5–15%: 1pt)   ■ Poor replies — % acknowledged/no-action   (>60%: 3pts   30–60%: 2pts   10–30%: 1pt)

Noise Disturbance (17 open)
Case ID Sub-Cluster Block Days Open Summary Status
1292-3419 Noise Disturbance Blk 61 299 Note posted to noisy neighbour about loud singing at Blk 61. In Progress
To Block 61, [unit]
I have posted a note in Chinese in their letterbox earlier to request they keep their singing volume low and avoid singing at late hours. We have already shut our room doors and windows but can still hear their high pitch singing loudly especially late in the night. The owner just ignore.
1292-4201 Noise Disturbance Blk 57 122 Ongoing knocking and dragging noises from unit above since morning. In Progress
Case No.: 1292-4193
Hi! MCST Team, FYI, y’day morning at 0650-hrs., at the common bedroom. They knocking and dropping hard subject on the floor and the loud knocking sound wake me up from my sweet dream. At 1925-hrs., same room. Keep knocking and dragging the floor, the tak tak noise non-stop for almost 2-hours. This morning at 0705-hrs., same room. Again, knocking and dropping hard subject on the floor and the loud noise wake me up again. At 0950-hrs., having running foot steps and knocking noise from my living/dining area ceiling. May I know how long do we have to bear with this neighbour? I do not wish to active police officers for settlement.
1292-4463 Noise Disturbance Blk 57 78 Neighbor shouting and screaming nightly until midnight. In Progress
Noise Disturbance Complaint – Unit [unit]
Dear MCST Management, I would like to lodge a complaint regarding my neighbour at Unit [unit]. He has been repeatedly shouting and screaming inside his unit at night, usually from around 8:00 p.m. until midnight. The noise level is very loud and can be clearly heard in our unit even with our doors closed. When we walk past his unit, the shouting becomes even louder and has caused us to feel frightened and disturbed. This has been happening on multiple occasions and has affected our peace and sense of safety at home. We would appreciate it if MCST could look into this matter, check on the resident to understand the reason for such behaviour, and advise him to be more considerate of his neighbours, especially during night hours. Thank you for your time and assistance in looking into this matter.
1292-4575 Noise Disturbance Blk 53 62 Neighbor repeatedly banging loudly on balcony railing. In Progress
Inconsiderate behavior from 53 [unit]
22nd Feb Sunday - This inconsiderate lady is at it again! I was sitting at the balcony reading when I heard the loud banging noise (6 times) at around 1111am. Then at around 1133am, she tried doing it again but when I saw her hand came out, I shouted at her and she banged the metal tool outside her balcony once before retracting it back. There are no one around her unit smoking nor did I see or smell any cigarette smoke as she has claimed. I tried to ignore this issue for weeks hoping it will stop eventually but this lady clearly has no intention of discontinuing her disgusting act. Is there anything anyone can do to STOP this disturbing behavior? Many thanks in advance.
1292-4586 Noise Disturbance Blk 61 59 Recurring furniture-dragging noise nightly from unit above. In Progress
Complaint Regarding Noise Disturbance from Unit 61
I would like to report a recurring noise disturbance coming from Unit 61. There is frequent noise from dragging furnitures, which occurs daily and has even taken place as late as 2:30 AM and in the early morning hours. The noise may be coming from residents of units #21–80. I would greatly appreciate it if you could notify the relevant household(s) and consider posting a general notice to remind residents of the need to observe public decency and be mindful of their responsibilities toward others in the community. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
1292-4684 Noise Disturbance Blk 61 45 Neighbor singing past 9pm, noise mitigation wearing off. In Progress
Noise Complain
[unit], After so many months of peace, give and take between both parties, we are going back towards square one. They installed sound proofing which worked to mitigate 80% of their noise. However, they have recently gone back to singing past 9pm, on one day singing past 1030pm, and the woman's voice has become a lot more audible. Whether is it because they no longer care to close their doors and windows when singing, or the woman is singing from a different non-soundproofed room. It is starting to become very disruptive again.
1292-4682 Noise Disturbance Blk 53 45 Neighbor repeatedly banging loudly on balcony railing. In Progress
Block 53 [unit]
I’m working from home today and the lady is at it again. 8 solid knocks and I don’t even need to look out of the balcony to know it’s her. Is there nothing anyone can do to stop this barbaric behavior?! Many thanks in advance for any help in resolving this issue.
1292-4715 Noise Disturbance Blk 47 41 Late-night groups at pavilion being loud and playing cards. In Progress
Outdoor Pavillions
Sunday @ 10.30pm - there were 2 groups of pavillion users #1) philipinos group of 3 - laughing and talking loudly and it was so loud I can hear from terrace area even after walk away. #2) china chinese group of 4, not noisy but playing poker cards. The patrolling Security guard just walk past towards function room direction probably to perform clocking but did not remind the residents/tenants on the over-time (which is beyond 10pm) , did not get them to leave the pavillion and did not stop them from the loud noises or gambling in open public. Please remind our security team to keep an active look out when they are patrolling the area and to moderate any bad behaviours when spotted. They cannot just “walk past” without taking enforcement actions.

hi. the unit directly above us has been creating disturbance throughout the day and night with loud thumping/stomping sounds. we can even feeling the ceiling vibrating. could the management do something about this please?
1292-4949 Noise Disturbance Blk 61 13 Noise disturbance reported from nearby unit at . In Progress
Follow-up on Unresolved Noise Disturbance
As I previously reported (Case ID: 1292-4799), I have been experiencing persistent noise disturbances for over two months. The issue involves furniture-dragging noises lasting several minutes to up to half an hour, occurring almost every day especially midnight. I had requested that the following measures be taken: 1. Remind residents of Blk 61 Units 19-80, 22-80, and 20-72 to avoid dragging furniture during quiet hours or to use protective covers. 2. Post notices throughout the building to remind all residents not to drag furniture during quiet hours or to use protective measures. You indicated that a notice would be drafted and circulated to all residents in the block. However, it has now been two weeks, and I have not seen any notice issued. The problem also remains unresolved. Could you please let me know when these measures will be implemented? This ongoing disturbance is significantly affecting my ability to rest, and I would appreciate prompt action to address the issue.
1292-4979 Noise Disturbance Blk 61 10 Request for physical notice regarding ongoing noise disturbance. In Progress
Physical Notice Not Posted for Ongoing Noise Issue
As I reported previously (Case No. 1292-4969), I have been experiencing continuous noise disturbances in my room in Block 61 for over two months, including repeated furniture-dragging noises during late-night hours. I had requested that a notice be posted, and I was informed that it had been placed both on the notice board and on the HiLife app. However, I have not seen any physical notice since my request on March 31. I would therefore like to request that this be properly followed through. Please ensure that a physical notice is posted in visible common areas, such as near the elevators, as is done for other announcements. This is important to effectively remind all residents to refrain from dragging furniture during late-night hours, or to use appropriate protective measures. The issue remains unresolved and continues to significantly affect my living environment. I would appreciate your prompt action on this matter.
1292-5007 Noise Disturbance Blk 59 6 Persistent engine noise throughout day and night disturbing resident. In Progress
Persistent noise across all day and night
Dear [Resident], I'd like to report that there is some sort of engine noise from time to time across whole day, which is quite disturbing during sleep (I'm at 59 BLK [unit]). It sounds like air con external unit but I couldn't confirm. It may also come from the lift, or some kinds of renovation, but it's quite strange that the noise can be heard even on 1am every day. This noise has been there for over 1 week, from day to night, and has been significantly disturbing our sleep. Could you please help with this issue? Please also let me know if anything I can do on my end. Thank you so much! PS. I tried to record the noise but this kind of low-frenquency noise can hardly be heard in the recording; it would be good if you could arrange someone to visit and hear the noise in person as it's across all day and night.
1292-5023 Noise Disturbance Blk 61 4 Noise disturbance reported from nearby unit at Block 61. Pending
Repeated Late-Night Noise Severely Affecting Sleep
Dear Property Management Team, I am writing to report a recurring noise issue that has been seriously affecting my sleep. I reside at Blk 61, Unit [unit]. Almost every night, I hear the sound of chairs being dragged across the floor from the unit above. The noise is extremely sharp and disturbing, especially during late-night hours. Approximately two weeks ago, a resident from the 20th floor had also raised a similar concern with the management team. At that time, I communicated with that resident, and it was confirmed that the noise was not coming from my unit. Based on what I have consistently heard, the source of the noise appears to be from the unit directly above mine, which is on the 22nd floor. At the time of writing this message, it is already 1:00 AM, and the upstairs unit continues to produce repeated dragging noises of furniture. This ongoing disturbance is severely impacting my ability to rest. It also clearly violates the quiet hours policy stated on the notices displayed on each floor of Blk 61. For verification, the management team may wish to speak with both myself and the resident of Unit [unit]. In addition, I have recorded audio evidence of the noise and can provide it if required. I kindly request the property management team to investigate this matter and take appropriate action to resolve the issue as soon as possible. Thank you for your attention to this matter. Sincerely, Ted
1292-5044 Noise Disturbance Blk 61 3 Resident receiving noise complaints from neighbour without specific details. Pending
neighbor sending noise complaint but no details
I wanted to flag an ongoing issue I’m dealing with. A neighbor has been sending guards and written notices to my unit with noise complaints, but without specifying what the actual issue is. I’ve now received three complaints, the most recent tonight at 11pm. A few things I’d like to raise: • The guards have come to my door as late as 2am, which is unsettling given that I live alone. • One notice asked me to stop moving furniture and heavy boxes — but the neighbor in question lives above me, not below, so I’m confused about how that applies. • I’m not being given any details about the specific complaints, which makes it impossible for me to address anything. I’d really appreciate your help understanding what’s going on and what my options are here. I live along and this situation is making me uncomfortable and I’d like to resolve it properly

1292-4655 Equipment Malfunction Blk 47 49 Three treadmills down again, no definite repair timeline. In Progress
three treadmill down again
can I have a definite answer on when the treadmill is repaired fully? how is it possible 50% of the treadmill keep undergoing repair?
1292-4680 Equipment Malfunction Blk 47 46 Multiple treadmills unusable for months, inadequate gym. In Progress
Complaint Regarding Unusable Treadmills and Insuff
Dear [Resident], I would like to raise a concern regarding the current condition and capacity of the condo gym facilities. Several treadmills in the gym have been unusable for an extended period. The last update provided about their repair was on 10 January, and it has now been two full months without resolution. This delay is unacceptable, and I would appreciate an immediate update and a clear timeline for when the treadmills will be repaired and returned to service. In addition, the gym facilities are severely insufficient for a development of approximately 1,800 units. The limited number of machines, combined with the number of residents using the gym, results in very long waiting times for equipment. It is common to wait significant periods just to access basic machines such as treadmills, which significantly affects residents’ ability to exercise. The space and equipment capacity of the gym clearly do not match the size of the resident population. This leads to overcrowding and an overall poor user experience for residents who rely on these facilities. I urge the management to address the following as soon as possible: Provide an immediate update and timeline for repairing the unusable treadmills. Improve maintenance responsiveness for gym equipment. Review the adequacy of gym facilities and equipment given the number of units in the development. As residents, we expect the facilities we pay for through maintenance fees to be properly maintained and adequate for the community. I look forward to your prompt response and concrete actions to resolve these issues.
1292-4688 Equipment Malfunction Blk 55 45 Half the gym treadmills broken for months, always queues. In Progress

Hello, half the treadmills in the gym remain broken and there is almost always a line for this at the gym. They have not been fixed for many months. Please resolve this as soon as possible.

1292-4476 Theft/Loss Blk 53 77 Bicycle seat stolen at Blk 53, police report filed.SAFETY In Progress
stolen bicycle seat at block 53
refer case 1292-4470 , I've made a police report D/[phone]/7059. I'm disappointed the case was closed when nothing was done. step up the security in this estate.
1292-4644 Theft/Loss Blk 61 51 Bicycle seat stolen at Blk 61 B1, security saw thief.SAFETY In Progress
Stolen bicycle seat at Blk 61 B1 bicycle park area
Between 22:15-22:30 on 5 Mar 2026 , someone stolen my bicycle seat at Blk 61 B1 bicycle park area. One security guard saw the thief and questioned him and understand that the thief said he was repairing his bicycle and shown the security guard his Hilife app. My son happend to come back same time and saw the security guard talking to the thief. My son did not realise that thief was targeting my bicycle and when home sensed something wrong. He immediately went down to B1 and found that the seat was stolen. Hence, he informed the same security guard who spoke to the thief. Understand that the thief is chinese, medium height slightly long hair. Two questions for MA: 1) should police report be made ? 2) when can camera be installed to capture future thief ?
1292-4646 Theft/Loss Blk 61 50 Bicycle seat stolen at Blk 61 B1, thief on video.SAFETY In Progress
Stolen bicyle seats at Blk 61 B1 bicycle park
As reported, my bicycle seat was stolen on 5 Mar 2026 10+pm. Later i realised that my car was parked near bicycle park area and extracted the car camera with videos of the thief in action. There are 3 key videos which I would like to share 1) The thief came out from Blk 61 carpark side door and target at my bicycle ( I suggest MA checked the video at B1 lobby and lift between 22:00-22:03, you should be able to get his face) 2) Second video shown the secuirty came by while the thief is benting over still trying to steal my bicycle seat 3) Third video shown the thief successfully stolen the seat and walked away. I would like to make police report tomorrow and hope MA could help extract his photo from B1 lobby camara to facilitate the police report between 22:00-22:03

Landscaping Quality (4 open)
Case ID Sub-Cluster Block Days Open Summary Status
1292-4216 Landscaping Quality Unknown 119 Plants behind villa uprooted months ago still not replaced, causing ponding. In Progress
Bad ponding due to uprooted plants NOT replaced!
This issue has been flagged out by the management team ~3 months ago. This is for the area behind villa number 17. Plants were uprooted more than 3 months ago due to heavy rainstorms. Lacklustfe effort to replace the plants. Barely enough plants replanted! For over 3 months, our backyard suffered from very bad ponding due to huge areas of flooded mud exposed! This is a big mosquito breeding risk. We and the neighbours are frustrated about the lack of plants in the backyard. We will organise a group feedback to NEA if the vegetation and landscaping problems continue to persist!

Stray Cats in Estate
Dear MA team, another free roaming cat near Blk59 which is different as this is with a collar & very relaxingly walking in the compound, not afraid of humans. The one i reported on Sunday was different behaviour , looks preganat , agressive and hiding in bush when see humans. 1292-5037 Dog/Pet Waste Blk 45 3 Request to enforce pet restrictions near poolside common area. Pending
Feedback on Pet Control Near Poolside Area
Dear [Resident], I am writing to raise a concern regarding pets being brought to the poolside area. Recently, some residents have been allowing their dogs to urinate and defecate near the pool. This has resulted in unpleasant odors, which significantly affect the environment and comfort of residents who are using the swimming facilities. For hygiene and safety reasons, I would like to suggest that stricter guidelines be implemented to restrict pets from entering or walking near the poolside deck area. In particular, the poolside deck with dark brown flooring, as well as the adjacent grass areas, should be clearly designated as no-pet zones. Additionally, it would be helpful if management could establish a dedicated dog-walking area for pet owners. The surrounding walking paths around the condominium would be a more appropriate space for this purpose and would help balance the needs of both pet owners and other residents. Clear signage and communication of these guidelines would also help ensure better compliance. Thank you for your attention to this matter. I appreciate your efforts in maintaining a clean and pleasant living environment for all residents. Yours sincerely, Amelia
1292-5057 Dog/Pet Waste Unknown 0 Concerns about dog playground cleanliness, noise, and operating hours. Pending
dog playground
I am not against but make sure the place keep clean and no smell. there must be operating hours from 8am to 9pm. noise control is key to nearby terrace houses. dogs must be on leash. as next is swimming pool, there must be new dividers to ensure safety and also preventing dogs from going in

Speeding/Safety (3 open)
Case ID Sub-Cluster Block Days Open Summary Status
1292-3875 Speeding/Safety Blk 45 201 Main carpark entry stop line hidden by slope, needs better signage. In Progress
Main carpark entry
Hi mgt, it is very irresponsible to say drivers are expected to slow down where the entrance is built with an up hill manner where the stop line is hidden as it's at the bottom of the slope. This is absolutely the duty of the mgt to make the stop line visible for drivers before approaching then entrance, since you disregard putting a stop sign. If anything undesirable accident should happen, I'm sure the management is implicated. As for the exit at the security guard post, placing a mirror helps regulate the traffic safety. When such safety hazard is identified, even HDB will take action to erect the mirror and you are saying the professional is telling you it's fine, then get the professional to mitigate for you when mgt is implicated.

1292-4636 Common Area Leak Blk 47 52 Blk 47 lobby ceiling leaking and mouldy after aircon leak. In Progress
previously reported - leaking and mouldy ceiling
I previously reported that the air-conditioning units in the lobby of Block 47 may be leaking, which appears to have caused ceiling damage and mould growth. It seems the root cause has not been properly resolved, as the paintwork completed 1–2 months ago is already showing signs of deterioration and mould recurrence. I would suggest that the team investigate and rectify the underlying issue rather than applying surface-level fixes, and only close this feedback once the matter has been satisfactorily addressed. The current condition is unsightly and may pose hygiene concerns for users of the common space. Two areas have been highlighted in this report for reference.
Dirty Lift (2 open)
Case ID Sub-Cluster Block Days Open Summary Status
1292-4394 Dirty Lift Blk 45 86 Blk 45 lift mirror foggy and uncleaned for a month. In Progress
Cleanliness Issue: Lift Mirror at Block 45
Dear Management Team, I would like to raise a concern regarding the cleanliness of the lift at Block 45. The mirror inside the lift has been foggy and full of visible spots for the past month and does not appear to have been cleaned during this period. I regularly see cleaning staff stationed around the B1 lobby, which makes this oversight rather disappointing. The lift is a high-traffic area and reflects the overall standard of cleanliness within the condo. May I check if this is the level of cleanliness that management intends to maintain? I believe the team is capable of doing better, and I hope this issue can be addressed promptly. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

1292-5043 Door Left Unsecured Blk 49 3 Security or access issue reported at Block 49. Pending
Lvl 1 Doors at block 49 are kept open often
The doors at block 49 level 1 are often kept open (both sides). Given we don’t have security to prevent anyone from accessing any floor, such actions are irresponsible and a threat to the security of residents in the block. Additionally the doors at lvl 1 of block 49 do not close completely. Since it is impossible to ensure that everyone does the right thing, it is recommended to change the design of the doors to those that cannot be held open (similar to those at the basement) to ensure security. This is also common place in other condominiums (such as stirling residences, commonwealth towers, queens arc, alex residences, echelon etc).

1292-5069 Gate Fault Blk 47 -3 Block 47 level 1 poolside gate has loose hinges and slams aggressively. Pending
Loose Main Gate at Block 47, Level 1 (Pool Side) –
I am writing to report a serious safety issue regarding the main gate at Block 47, Level 1 (the entrance near the swimming pool). The gate hinges or the closing mechanism have become extremely loose. It swings wide with very little force and slams shut/open aggressively. This poses a significant danger to residents, especially children and the elderly, as it could easily strike someone passing by. Please arrange for a technician to inspect and repair the gate as soon as possible to prevent any accidents. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Visitor Access (1 open)
Case ID Sub-Cluster Block Days Open Summary Status
1292-5073 Visitor Access Blk 53 -4 Grab car entered through the second guard house without proper passenger verification. Pending
Non-resident car entered from 2nd guard house
Incident happened at 7.35am. Grab car allowed to enter but was seen trying to make a u-turn. However, when my car was entering, the car decided to drive down the ramp. (1) did the 2nd post guard and main guard communicate to record down the car plate and details and if there is passenger in the car, did she verified she is a visitor or owner? (2) why is the car making a u-turn if the details are recorded and the car allowed to pass through the barrier? (3) if the car is instructed to make a u-turn, why is the guard not monitoring the car and ensuring the car make the u-turn safely? (4) why is the security guard still recording car details using paper and pen? please follow up.
